type_d.name: Type D: Coins and Small Objects
type_d.subtitle: Treasure Generator
description: This treasure is made up coins and small magic items, such as potions, scrolls, and wands. The exact magic items included in these rewards are determined using the tables listed. The specific table used is specified by the reward.
### Table 7-5: Type D Treasure, Coins and Small Objects
